description: How to interpret fabio command output

success_list_paginated.description: Partial list; pass token via --continuation-token to get next page

error.description: Error response (on stderr, non-zero exit code)

extracting_ids.description: After creating an item, extract its ID for use in subsequent commands

dry_run.description: All mutating commands support --dry-run which returns the planned request without executing

common_patterns.list_then_show: Use 'list' to find IDs, then 'show' with --id for details
common_patterns.create_returns_id: All 'create' commands return the new item's 'id' in data.id
common_patterns.stdin_support: Commands with --sql, --kql, --prompt accept stdin when flag is omitted
